use_cases: Display loading state during async operations like data fetching or API calls
Indicate processing status during form submissions or file uploads
Show transitional states between page navigation or content loading
Provide visual feedback while waiting for real-time data updates
Enhance user experience during long-running computations or searches
ai_summary: A metamorphic loader component featuring concentric circles with progressively lightening colors that animate with a spinning effect. The component creates a visually engaging loading indicator with customizable size and base color, suitable for indicating processing or waiting states across various web applications.
